archive_data.question_text: चट्टानों के अध्यन को क्या कहते हैं?

explanation.english: The study of rocks is called Petrology (शैल विज्ञान). It is derived from Greek words 'petra' meaning rock and 'logos' meaning study.
explanation.tanglish: Kalgalin adhayanathai Petrology endrum peyaridalaam. Idhu 'petra' (parai/kal) matrum 'logos' (adhayanam) endra Greek solgalin uruvakkappattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी, भारतीय संविधान की संघीय विशेषता नहीं है?

options.text: केंद्र और राज्यों के बीच शक्तियों का बँटवारा

explanation.english: Single citizenship is a unitary feature, not federal. In a federal system, there is usually dual citizenship, but India has single citizenship where every citizen is a citizen of India only.
explanation.tanglish: Otrai nagarigam (Single Citizenship) endradhu otrariya (unitary) thanmai, samaya anivagam (federal) alla. Samaya anivaga thittangalil irandu nagarigangal irukkum, anaigarathil India otrai nagarigam mattume kondirukkirathu.

archive_data.question_text: 2011 की जनगणना के अनुसार, भारत के किस केंद्र शासित प्रदेश में सबसे अधिक लिंगानुपात (प्रति 1000 पुरुषों पर महिलाएँ) है?

explanation.english: According to the 2011 Census, Puducherry had the highest sex ratio of 1037 females per 1000 males among Union Territories.
explanation.tanglish: 2011 maanila adippadayathin anusaram, Kuducheryil (Puducherry) 1000 aanukku 1037 pendir endrum linganupatham irundhadhu, idhu kendrasaanupradesangalil adhigam.

archive_data.question_text: According to the UNDP Human Development Report 2021-22, what was the Human Development Index rank of India?

explanation.english: According to the UNDP Human Development Report 2021-22, India was ranked 132nd with an HDI value of 0.633.
explanation.tanglish: UNDP Manitha Valarchi Arikkai (HDR) 2021-22 anusaram, India 132-am idathil HDI maanila 0.633-udan irundhadhu.

archive_data.question_text: भारतीय संविधान में कानून के शासन का विचार किस देश से लिया गया है?

explanation.english: The concept of Rule of Law was borrowed from the United Kingdom (British Constitution). It means everyone is equal before the law.
explanation.tanglish: Sattathin Aazhvalarchi (Rule of Law) endra karuththu Britain (United Kingdom) samvidhanathilirundhu eduthukkappattadhu. Idhu sattam munbu ellorum saman endra porul.

archive_data.question_text: Who authored 'Untouchable' depicting the caste system?

explanation.english: 'Untouchable' was written by Mulk Raj Anand in 1935. It depicts the caste system and a day in the life of Bakha, an untouchable sweeper.
explanation.tanglish: 'Untouchable' endra puthagam Mulk Raj Anand 1935-il ezhuthiyadhu. Idhu thanithasai vaga nindha thodu meendumavar Bakha vazhkaiyai matrum jathi thottathai varnigirathu.

archive_data.question_text: मूल रूप से, भारत के संविधान में ________ अनुसूचियां थीं।

explanation.english: The original Constitution of India had 8 Schedules. Currently, there are 12 Schedules after various amendments.
explanation.tanglish: India Samvidhanathil moolathil 8 Anusuigal (Schedules) irundhana. Pala samargaalaka thittangalukku pinbu, ippothu 12 Anusuigal ullana.
